title: Lab 46: Container Load And Inspect
description: Load a provided container image into user storage and inspect its metadata with podman

tasks: Create user scope46 and set the password to cinder9.
As user scope46, load the image archive /opt/rhcsa/container-assets/rhcsa-httpd-base.tar into local storage.
As user scope46, inspect localhost/rhcsa-httpd-base:latest and write the configured working directory to /home/scope46/workdir.txt.
If the image has no explicit configured user, write root to /home/scope46/user.txt. Otherwise write the configured user value.
checks: getent passwd scope46 >/dev/null && getent shadow scope46 | awk -F: 'length($2)>0 && $2 !~ /^(!!?|\*|LK|NP)$/ {ok=1} END {exit !ok}'
runuser -l scope46 -c 'test -f /home/scope46/workdir.txt && test "$(podman image inspect localhost/rhcsa-httpd-base:latest --format {{.Config.WorkingDir}})" = "$(cat /home/scope46/workdir.txt)"'

runuser -l scope46 -c 'test -s /home/scope46/user.txt && actual="$(podman image inspect localhost/rhcsa-httpd-base:latest --format {{.Config.User}})" && if [ -z "$actual" ]; then test "$(cat /home/scope46/user.txt)" = root; else test "$(cat /home/scope46/user.txt)" = "$actual"; fi'
task_titles: Create user scope46 and set the password
If the image has no explicit configured user, write...
